json_contract_evidence: ps --json corrupt runtime state now rethrows with config context, so the failure envelope includes command/status/error plus projectRoot and configPath. stop --json partial_failure now emits createPartialEnvelope('stop', ...), producing ok:false, status:'partial', error.code:'partial_failure', projectRoot, configPath, and per-task stop_failed results.
review_blocker_repair_evidence: T015 ps configPath blocker is covered by the passing regression: ps --json reports runtime_state_invalid with config context when state JSON is corrupt. Stop partial handling was added in src/cli.js without modifying runtime.js or tests, mapping error.details.failures to `{task, ok:false, status:'stop_failed', error}` and returning exit code 1.
